originalTitle: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
title: A Royal Story: Prince Harry and the Helping Hands
content:
Hello, Friends!

Hello, super explorers and clever kids! We have a news story for you from far away. It's about a real prince named Prince Harry.

Princes often live in big castles and help many people. Prince Harry is one of those princes who loves to help, especially children.

He helped start a very special group called Sentebale. This group is like a team of helpers who work to make children's lives better, especially here in Africa!

But sometimes, even good people can have big disagreements. And that's what our story is about today.

Who is Prince Harry?

Imagine someone who grew up in a very, very old and grand palace. That's Prince Harry!

He is a prince from a country called the United Kingdom, far across the ocean. His father is King Charles, who is the King of that country.

Princes and princesses often use their special position to do good things in the world. They visit people, open new schools, and help important causes.

Prince Harry has always cared a lot about helping others, especially children who might be sad or sick.

Did you know? Princes and princesses don't wear crowns all the time, only for very special events!

What is Sentebale?

Sentebale is a very important word. It means "forget-me-not" in a language from a country in Africa called Lesotho.

Sentebale is like a giant helping hand for children in Africa. It helps children who might have lost their parents, or who are living with special health challenges.

This charity makes sure these children get the help they need to feel healthy, happy, and hopeful for the future.

They provide things like medicine, a safe place to live, and people to talk to. They help children play and learn, just like you do!

Did you know? Lesotho is a small country completely surrounded by South Africa! It's very beautiful with mountains.

Starting a Special Team

Many years ago, Prince Harry worked with another person to start Sentebale. When two people start something together, we say they "co-founded" it.

Prince Harry cared deeply about the children in Africa. He wanted to make a real difference in their lives.

He spent time in Africa and saw how much help some children needed. So, he and his friend decided to create Sentebale to be that help.

It was a wonderful idea, and Sentebale has helped thousands of children since it began.

What is a Charity?

A charity is a special group of people who work together to help others. They don't do it to get rich, but because they want to do good things.

They often collect money from people who want to help. This money is then used to buy things like food, books, medicine, or to build schools and hospitals.

Sentebale is a charity that helps children. There are many other charities that help animals, or clean up the environment, or help people learn.

Charities are very important because they make the world a kinder place for everyone.

Did you know? When you share your toys or help a friend, you are showing a little bit of what charities do every day!

A Big Disagreement

Last year, something sad happened. Prince Harry and the charity, Sentebale, had a very big disagreement.

It was about how the charity was being run. Imagine if you and your friends were building a sandcastle, and you couldn't agree on how to build the towers or where to put the flag.

This disagreement was much bigger, about how the important work of Sentebale should be done. It was not a happy fight, and we call it an "acrimonious dispute."

Because of this big disagreement, Prince Harry decided to leave the charity. He stopped being a part of their team.

What Does "Sued" Mean?

Now, here's the newest part of the story. Sentebale, the charity, has "sued" Prince Harry.

What does it mean to "sue" someone? It's like when two people have a very serious argument that they can't fix by themselves.

So, one person asks a special judge or a court to help them. They want the judge to listen to both sides and decide what is fair and what is true.

In this case, Sentebale is asking a judge to look into something Prince Harry might have said.

What is "Defamation"?

Sentebale is saying that Prince Harry might have done something called "defamation." That's a big word, but it's not too hard to understand.

Defamation means saying things about someone that are not true and that make other people think badly of them.

Imagine if someone told your friends something untrue about you, and then your friends thought you were not kind, even though you are!

When someone says untrue things that hurt someone's good name, it can make it hard for them to do their work or for people to trust them.

So, Sentebale believes that Prince Harry said something that was not true and made the charity look bad.

Did you know? It's very important to always try and tell the truth. Telling the truth helps everyone trust each other.

Why Is This Happening?

So, to put it simply, Sentebale is saying that Prince Harry said some things that were not true after he left the charity.

They believe these words made people think bad things about the charity, and that made it harder for Sentebale to do its important work helping children.

Because of this, they have asked a judge to help them fix the problem and make things right.

It's a serious situation, but we hope that everyone involved remembers the most important thing: the children that Sentebale helps.

Did you know? Even grown-ups need help sometimes to sort out their big disagreements!

Helping Children Still Matters Most

Even with all this news about disagreements, it's good to remember what Sentebale is really all about.

It's about helping children in Africa grow up strong and happy. It's about giving them hope and a chance to play and learn.

No matter what happens with this disagreement, the helpers at Sentebale will keep working hard for the children.

And we hope that Prince Harry, who helped start this wonderful work, still cares deeply about these children too.

We will keep you updated on this story, but for now, let's remember the amazing work charities do to make the world a better place for everyone, especially for children who need a little extra love and care.

Let's all try to be kind and remember that telling the truth is very important.
summary: A charity called Sentebale, which Prince Harry helped start to help children in Africa, is now asking a judge to look into claims that Prince Harry said untrue things about them after he left the group.
whyMatters: This story matters because it reminds us how important it is for everyone, even princes, to be careful with their words, especially when talking about groups that do good work like helping children.

originalTitle: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
title: Oh No! Chimps in Uganda Are Not Friends Anymore!
content:
Hello, wonderful explorers! I'm your friendly Africa Kids News Reporter, ready to tell you an amazing story about some very special animal friends in our beautiful continent! We are going to visit the amazing country of Uganda today. Uganda is a sunny place in East Africa, full of green forests and cool animals.

Meet the Chimpanzees!

Today, we are talking about chimpanzees! Chimpanzees are like our forest cousins. They are super smart, can use tools, and love to play. They live in big families, just like you might live with your family, but much bigger! Did you know? Chimpanzees share almost all their DNA with humans! That means we are very similar to them! Chimps have black fur, strong arms, and very clever hands. They can swing through trees and walk on the ground. They eat yummy fruits, green leaves, and sometimes even small insects. In Uganda, there is a very famous group of chimps. They live in a place called Ngogo. For a long, long time, the Ngogo chimps were one giant, happy family. They all lived together in one big forest home.

A Big Family Splits Up

Imagine your classroom. Everyone plays together, shares toys, and sits together. That's how the Ngogo chimps were! They would groom each other, play tag in the trees, and cuddle their babies. They were a very close-knit community. But then, something big happened. About eight years ago, the Ngogo chimpanzees started having big arguments. It was like they stopped agreeing on things. They couldn't live together peacefully anymore. Did you know? Chimpanzee babies stay with their mothers for many years, learning everything they need to know! Eight years is a super long time! Think about it: if you are in Class 2 now, this big argument started before you were even born! It's a very long time for friends to be mad at each other.

Why Did They Stop Being Friends?

Why did they stop being friends? Well, scientists are still studying this. But they think it's about their forest home. Chimps need lots of food, like ripe fruits, and lots of space to play and find food. They call this their 'territory'. Perhaps some chimps wanted more space for their own little group. Or maybe they wanted all the best fruit trees! It's a bit like when you share your toys or your crayons. Sometimes, friends can argue about sharing. So, the big Ngogo chimp family broke into two different groups. Now, one group lives on one side of the forest, and the other group lives on a different side. They don't visit each other anymore. They don't play together. Did you know? Chimpanzees use special calls and hoots to talk to each other across the forest!

What Happens Now?

When the two groups meet near their dividing line, things can get scary. They might hoot loudly, stomp their feet, or even have big fights. This is very sad because they used to be such good friends. They are not sharing their forest anymore. Each group wants to keep its own part of the forest all to itself. They are very protective of their space and their food. These fights are not like people fighting with words. For chimps, it can mean serious injuries. They can bite and hurt each other. This is why it's a very serious situation for them.

People Are Watching (Researchers!)

Lots of clever people are watching these chimpanzees every day. We call these people 'researchers'. Researchers are like detectives for animals! They want to understand why this big family split up. They go into the forest quietly and watch the chimps. They write down everything they see: who plays with whom, what they eat, and if they fight. They are trying to solve the mystery of the Ngogo chimps. Did you know? Researchers sometimes spend many years in the forest, just like the chimps do, learning about their lives! These researchers hope to learn how to help chimps live peacefully. They also want to make sure all chimps are safe. It is very important to protect these amazing animals.

Why Is This Story Important?

This story about the Ngogo chimps is important for many reasons. First, chimpanzees are amazing creatures, and we need to learn about them. They are an endangered species, which means there are not many left in the wild. When animals fight, it can put their lives in danger. We want all animals to live safe and happy lives in their natural homes. This story reminds us how important it is for everyone to get along. It teaches us that even among animals, sharing and peace are better than fighting. We want the Ngogo chimps to find a way to be friends again, or at least live side-by-side without fighting. So, let's all hope for peace in the Ngogo forest. And let's remember to be kind and share with our own friends and family too! Protecting our animal friends and their homes is a super important job for all of us!
summary: A large family of smart chimpanzees in Uganda, called the Ngogo chimps, used to live happily together but have now been fighting for eight years, splitting into two separate groups.
whyMatters: This matters because chimps are special animals that we need to protect, and when they fight, it can hurt them and make their lives harder, showing us that peace and sharing are important for everyone, even in nature.

originalTitle: De Zerbi 'not surprised' by reaction to Greenwood comments
title: Football Talk: Managers, Players, and Fans!
content:
Hello, super football friends! Do you love watching football? It's a game played all around the world! Many children in Africa love to kick a ball. It makes us happy. Today, we have some news from far away. It's about football, players, and people talking about the game.

Hello, Football Friends!

Football is a super exciting game! Two teams try to kick a ball into a goal. The team that scores more goals wins! It is a game of running, kicking, and teamwork. Millions of people love to watch football. They cheer for their favourite teams. It is a very popular sport. We often see football on TV. Or maybe we play it with our friends outside! It is a game for everyone. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole world! More people watch football than any other game.

Meet the Team and the Players

Every football team has many players. Each player has a special job. Some players are strikers. They try to score goals. Some are defenders. They stop the other team from scoring. And there is a goalkeeper! The goalkeeper protects the goal. All the players work together. They want to win the game. They train very hard. They practice kicking and running. Did you know? A football team usually has 11 players on the field at one time! Plus, there are other players who wait to play.

What Does a Manager Do?

Now, let's talk about someone very important. This person is called a "manager." A manager is like the boss of the team. They don't play on the field. But they tell the players what to do. They choose which players will play. They plan how the team will play. They help the players get better. Managers want their team to play well. They want their team to win. Roberto is a manager for a team called Tottenham. He helps his team. Did you know? Managers also decide what kind of uniform the team will wear for each game!

Hooray for Supporters!

Who are "supporters"? Supporters are like you and me! They are the fans who love the team. They go to the stadium to watch the games. They clap and cheer very loudly! They wear their team's colours. Supporters want their team to win. They feel happy when their team scores a goal. They also feel sad if their team loses. Supporters are very important. They give energy to the players. Did you know? Some football stadiums are so big, they can hold more than 100,000 supporters! That's like a whole town of people cheering!

Talking About the Game

Sometimes, people talk about football. They talk about the players. They talk about the games. This is called making "comments." A manager might say something about a player. He might say, "This player is very fast!" Or he might say, "Our team played very well today!" It is normal for people to talk about what they see. Especially in football, everyone loves to share their ideas. It is part of the fun! Did you know? People don't just talk about current games. They also talk about famous games from many years ago!

When People Share Their Thoughts

When someone makes "comments," other people listen. Then, they might have their own ideas. This is called a "reaction." Some people might agree with the manager. They might say, "Yes, that player is super fast!" Other people might not agree. They might say, "No, I think another player is faster!" Everyone has their own thoughts. That is okay! It is good to share ideas. Managers know this. They know that supporters will always have thoughts about what they say. Did you know? People also talk about football on radios and TVs. They share their reactions there too!

A Manager and His Thoughts

Roberto is the manager we talked about. He manages the Tottenham team. Roberto said some things about a player named Mason Greenwood. Mason is a football player. When Roberto made his comments, the supporters listened. And they had their reactions. They talked about what Roberto said. Roberto knew that people would talk. He knew that supporters would share their thoughts. He was "not surprised." This means he expected it. He knows that football fans always have opinions. It is part of the game! He understands that everyone loves football. Everyone has a voice. Did you know? Many football players start playing football when they are very young children, just like you!

Everyone Loves Football!

So, football is a game of fun. It is a game of teams, players, and managers. It is also a game of supporters. Everyone talks about it! People cheer. People share their thoughts. Managers say things. Supporters react. This is how the football world works. It is full of excitement and passion. It brings people together. Let's keep loving football! Did you know? The football used in games is usually made of many small pieces stitched together!
summary: A football manager named Roberto said he was not surprised when fans shared their thoughts about his comments on a player, because everyone loves to talk about football.
whyMatters: This news shows us that football is a game where managers, players, and supporters all have a voice, and it brings people together to cheer, talk, and share their love for the game.

originalTitle: Fernandez sorry but will miss Man City - Rosenior
title: Fernandez sorry but will miss Man City - Rosenior
content: Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez is still unavailable for the upcoming home match against Manchester City despite a recent apology, head coach Liam Rosenior says.
